name: Audience Performance
description: Rank audience cohorts by ROAS within and across ad platforms. Saturation indicators, overlap analysis, and expansion candidate flags so audiences get scaled or replaced on data, not gut.
alsoSurfaces: Which audiences are saturating and need expansion or replacement?
Which expansion candidates should we scale next month?
Where do audiences overlap and waste impressions?
Which audience–channel pairings are most efficient?
beforeWeRun: Time window — trailing 30 days, or custom?
Channels — all platforms with audience-level data?

whatYoullGet.name: Headline metrics
whatYoullGet.desc: Audience count, blended ROAS, saturating count, expansion candidate count.

whatYoullGet.name: Audience leaderboard
whatYoullGet.desc: Sortable table — audiences as rows, columns for spend, impressions, ROAS, saturation flag, frequency.

whatYoullGet.name: Top performers
whatYoullGet.desc: Card list with definition, stable-trend indicator, suggested next action.

whatYoullGet.name: Saturation warnings
whatYoullGet.desc: Time-series chart per saturating audience showing ROAS-vs-spend curve.

whatYoullGet.name: Underperformers
whatYoullGet.desc: Card list with diagnostic indicators and pause/replace recommendations.

whatYoullGet.name: Expansion candidates
whatYoullGet.desc: Card list with current spend and recommended scaling magnitude.

whatYoullGet.name: Overlap analysis
whatYoullGet.desc: Network or matrix visualization of overlap relationships between audiences.

callout: 3 quick inputs, then Sage builds your audience dashboard in ~10 min.
